disclaimer: Discovery clarification — fixtures not altered. Not a PASS claim.

explanations.N_approved_scale3000: Unique caseId rows in messy-pdf-proof-v9-scale3000 summary. Generated at run-time from ~70 demo-audit templates × trap axes. Not 3000 on-disk PDF folders.
explanations.N_materialised: On-disk directories under artifacts/evidence-state-audit-local/cases with truth-key.json. Used for baseline structured/output scans without regenerating 3000 bundles.
explanations.N_union: Deduped |scaleIds ∪ materialisedIds|. Inflated vs 3000 because most materialised IDs are source templates (demo-audit-*) or sims not present as scale caseIds.
explanations.materialised: ESA truth-key case folders on disk.
explanations.overlapping_exact_id: Materialised folder name equals a scale caseId (rare).
explanations.overlapping_via_sourceCaseId: Materialised folder name equals a scale row's sourceCaseId (template backing).
explanations.unique_for_final_pass_rates: N_approved_scale3000 — unique messy v9 caseId identities (generated from demo-audit templates)

uniqueFixtureDenominatorLabel: N_approved_scale3000 — unique messy v9 caseId identities (generated from demo-audit templates)
